content.scenarioHint: 你在进行视频会议前，发现对方的视频画面延迟严重，需要主动询问并确认问题原因。
content.speakerText: Your video is lagging pretty badly—could you check your internet connection?
content.speakerTextCn: 你的视频延迟很严重，能检查一下你的网络连接吗？
expectedAnswers: I'll restart my router—it might be buffering.
My Wi-Fi is weak right now; I'm switching to Ethernet.
I think it's my upload speed. Let me close some background apps.
Sorry! I'm on mobile data—let me join via Wi-Fi instead.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确指出了视频延迟问题并请求对方排查
语言准确性：语法和时态使用正确，无严重错误
表达自然度：符合日常英语口语习惯，语气礼貌自然
关键词覆盖：使用了 'lagging', 'internet', 'connection', 'buffering', 'Wi-Fi', 'mobile data' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: The call keeps dropping—what should I do?
content.speakerTextCn: 通话总是断线，我该怎么办？
expectedAnswers: Try restarting your router—it often fixes connection drops.
Switch to a stronger Wi-Fi network or use mobile data instead.
Make sure no other devices are using a lot of bandwidth right now.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否提供可行的解决方案
语言准确性：使用了router, bandwidth, switch, mobile data等术语
表达自然度：语句流畅，符合技术支持对话风格
关键词覆盖：包含connection, drop, bandwidth, switch等场景关键词
